MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT BRANDON AADEE'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons. Service of Summons on August 26, 2006 is quashed. This order does not address effectiveness of any other service. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/PJB/AC) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189
